title: Custom Gift Cards
description: What providers offer customizable, software‑compatible gift cards for small French businesses, including options for branding, denominations, and bulk ordering?
narrative: The user is seeking vendors that sell physical gift cards which can be personalized with a business name or logo, work with Easy Commerce POS software, and are available in multiple denominations (e.g., €10, €20, €50, €100) and bulk quantities (e.g., packs of 100 or 500). Relevant results should describe customization features, denomination breakdowns, compatibility details, and pricing or ordering options.

title: Lambs Apartment Search
description: Which rental apartments in Lambs offer at least two bedrooms, a terrace, and dedicated parking?
narrative: The user is looking for current rental listings in the Lambs area that meet specific criteria: a minimum of two separate bedrooms, a private or communal terrace, and a parking space for a vehicle. Relevant documents must describe individual apartments that include these features, provide size (in square metres) and basic price information, and be recent enough to be actionable (e.g., listings seen within the past few weeks). Listings lacking any of the three required amenities, or that are for sale rather than rent, are not relevant.

title: Lotus Classic Sales
description: Which classic Lotus cars are currently listed for sale in Belgium, including model, year, price, and FIA eligibility?
narrative: The user wishes to identify historic Lotus automobiles available on the market in Belgium. Relevant documents are those that contain a sale listing for a Lotus model (e.g., Lotus Elan S1, Lotus Elan FIA, Lotus Type 47, Lotus S1 K20, etc.), provide details such as the year of manufacture, asking price, and race eligibility (FIA passport, Appendix K, etc.), and indicate a Belgian location or seller. The user wants a concise compilation of all such listings to compare options for purchase.

title: Duck Fig Recipe
description: How can I prepare a dish using farm‑raised duck meat paired with figs, including detailed cooking steps?
narrative: The user is looking for a complete recipe that combines duck (preferably sourced from an open‑air farm such as La Ferme de JC) with figs. Relevant documents must contain instructions for preparing duck (e.g., roasting, sautéing, or magret) together with figs, list necessary ingredients, and provide step‑by‑step cooking directions. Mentions of the farm source or free‑range poultry are desirable but not mandatory; the key is the integration of duck and figs in a single dish.

title: Micropollutants in Water
description: What household products contribute to micropollutants in wastewater and what practical steps can consumers take to minimise their presence in drinking water sources?
narrative: The user is interested in understanding how everyday household items (e.g., detergents, cosmetics, cleaning agents) release synthetic micropollutants that pass through sewage treatment plants and end up in lakes, rivers, and groundwater. Relevant information should describe the types of substances, their environmental persistence, and health concerns, as well as concrete, consumer‑oriented actions (e.g., choosing natural products, using appropriate amounts) that can reduce the load of these pollutants. Documents that discuss the nature of synthetic chemicals, their passage through STPs, their accumulation in water bodies, and suggested mitigation measures are considered relevant.

title: Autoimmune Eye Signs
description: Which ocular features are characteristic of rheumatoid arthritis and systemic lupus erythematosus?
narrative: The user wants a detailed summary of eye‑related manifestations of the two systemic autoimmune diseases, covering both anterior and posterior segment findings as well as any treatment‑related ocular effects. Relevant information should list specific conditions such as peripheral keratitis, sclerosing keratitis, and venous stasis retinopathy for rheumatoid arthritis, and retinal hemorrhages, arteriolar narrowing, posterior segment changes, episcleritis/scleritis, and anterior uveitis for systemic lupus erythematosus, while clearly distinguishing the patterns typical for each disease.

title: Morgins Used Cars
description: What used passenger cars are currently listed for sale in Morgins, Switzerland, and what are their make, model, year, mileage, price, and fuel type?
narrative: The user wants recent classified advertisements for used passenger cars located in Morgins (as shown on anibis.ch). Relevant results must include listings that provide the vehicle make and model, production year, odometer reading, asking price, and fuel type (e.g., petrol, diesel, hybrid). Documents that only discuss car rental services, energy‑label regulations, or unrelated used‑car brands outside Morgins are not relevant.

title: School Reform Portrayals
description: What French films have depicted school reforms and teacher challenges, and how do these cinematic portrayals relate to contemporary efforts to integrate Ukrainian refugee students into French schools?
narrative: The user is researching the cultural representation of French educational reforms through cinema and wants to identify films that illustrate historical changes in teaching methods, school policy, and teacher‑student dynamics (e.g., L'École Buissonnière, Le Trou Normand, Les Risques du Métier). Additionally, the user seeks up‑to‑date information on how modern French schools are handling the integration of Ukrainian refugee pupils, as described in recent news about UPE2A programs and the experiences of Ukrainian teenagers in French colleges. Relevant documents must discuss either the listed films and their school‑related themes or the current policies and personal accounts of Ukrainian students in French education.

title: Option Right Eligibility
description: What are the conditions and consequences of using the right of option on my unemployment benefits when I move from a low‑paying job to a higher‑paying position in the environmental sector?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive guidance on the French "right of option" for unemployment benefits, including eligibility thresholds, required benefit differentials, minimum work periods, and the effect on benefit amount and duration, specifically in the context of transitioning to a green‑industry job. Relevant documents must address the legal criteria, calculation methods, and practical examples of how the option impacts compensation after switching to a higher‑paid environmental employment.

title: Veolia client account
description: How do I create, log into, and manage my Veolia Water client space online?
narrative: The user is looking for step‑by‑step instructions for registering a new Veolia Water client account, logging in, resetting a forgotten password, and using the portal to pay bills, view consumption, and contact customer service. Relevant documents are those that describe the "Create Customer Space" process, the URL to the client area, required personal data, activation steps, and troubleshooting login issues. Information about AXA recruitment, subscription cancellations, or real‑estate listings is not relevant.

title: Teenage RC Offroad
description: What remote‑controlled 4×4 off‑road car from the 2021 market provides the best balance of speed, battery life, safety features, and age‑appropriateness for a 10‑12‑year‑old?
narrative: The user is looking for a recommendation of a 2021‑released 4×4 remote‑controlled off‑road car suitable for a child aged 10‑12. Relevant documents should be judged relevant if they describe models released in 2021, list specifications such as maximum speed, battery autonomy (at least ~20 minutes), control distance, age minimum, safety aspects (non‑toxic materials, easy handling), and price considerations. Sources that only discuss car‑sharing services or full‑size electric vehicles are not relevant.

title: Integrated Blight Management
description: What sustainable, multi‑layer approaches can potato growers use to control late blight and downy mildew, combining resistant varieties, decision‑support tools, precision farming, and biocontrol?
narrative: The user seeks information on comprehensive, environmentally friendly strategies for managing late blight and downy mildew in potato production. Relevant documents should describe the use of genetically resistant cultivars (e.g., varieties listed as resistant to downy mildew), decision‑support systems such as Mileos, precision‑farming techniques, and biocontrol measures. Materials focusing solely on conventional fungicide applications, unrelated crops, or culinary recipes are not relevant. The answer should integrate research findings, case studies from the European Association for Potato Research, and practical guidance for organic or low‑input farming systems.

title: Creation Consciousness
description: What connections exist between the Genesis creation narrative and modern spiritual teachings on ego and a new earth?
narrative: The user is looking for sources that describe the biblical account of creation (Genesis 1) and also discuss contemporary spiritual perspectives—particularly Eckhart Tolle’s ideas about the egoic mind, the emergence of a 'new heaven and new earth,' and how consciousness shapes reality. Documents that include explicit passages from Genesis, Tolle’s commentary on the ego and a transformed earth, or analyses that compare the ancient creation story with modern spiritual concepts are considered relevant.

title: YouTube Fire Conspiracies

narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information on the false claims linking the Camp Fire to laser weapons or government actions, the popularity and spread of these videos (including algorithmic recommendations), and any measures YouTube has taken to limit or label such content. Only sources that convey this notion of prevailing in a nuanced, domain‑specific way are considered relevant.

title: Low‑Usage Linky Plan

title: Kia Bongo 3 Evaluation
description: What are the specifications, variant options, pricing (new and used), and overall suitability of the Kia Bongo 3 for small‑business cargo and off‑road use, and where can spare parts be obtained?

title: Asterix Recent Events
description: What exhibitions, publications, and media releases concerning Asterix and its creators have taken place from 2020 to 2023?

description: What transatlantic routes and factors led to the introduction of Phytophthora infestans into Flanders in 1845?

description: What are the cheapest car‑rental options on Réunion Island that accept drivers aged 25‑70, include unlimited mileage, insurance, and free airport transfer?
narrative: The user is planning a trip to Réunion and wants to locate the most affordable rental cars that satisfy several constraints: the driver must be between 25 and 70 years old, the rental must include unlimited kilometres, comprehensive insurance (or a refundable deductible option), and a complimentary transfer from the airport (taxi or shuttle). title: Lincoln Contexts
description: Provide information covering the automotive Lincoln MKX fuel consumption, Abraham Lincoln’s political legacy, and collectible coins bearing Lincoln’s image.

title: Motorcycle Guardrail Fatality

narrative: The user is seeking comprehensive coverage of the specific fatal motorcycle accident that occurred on May 9, 2019 at Southeast 400th Way and Southeast 392nd Street in Emumclaw, Washington. title: Indre-et-Loire Land

title: KRAS Adenocarcinoma Biomarkers
description: Identify the molecular features and candidate therapeutic biomarkers associated with the three KRAS‑mutated lung adenocarcinoma subgroups (KP, KL, KC).
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information on how KRAS‑mutated lung adenocarcinoma patients are stratified into the KP (co‑occurring TP53 mutation), KL (co‑occurring STK11/LKB1 mutation), and KC (CDKN2A/B inactivation with low TTF‑1 expression) subtypes, and which molecules have been proposed as biomarkers or therapeutic targets for each subgroup. title: Public Office Transfer Fees

title: Halogen Acid Enthalpy

narrative: The user wants a recipe for Quiche Lorraine that omits eggs due to allergy or dietary restriction. narrative: The user seeks up‑to‑date information on the French return‑to‑work bonus, including whether the one‑month eligibility rule still applies, if the scheme is still active (some sources claim it was abolished in 2009 while newer €1,000 employment bonuses were introduced in 2021), the legal criteria (e.g., type of contract, previous RSA/RMI status, DDA/DDR), and the steps to claim the benefit.
